features.description: Create shared-skills repo on GitHub + clone locally to ~/RepoBase/shared-skills
features.acceptance: gh repo view petermcalister/shared-skills succeeds; local clone exists at ~/RepoBase/shared-skills with README.md and correct directory scaffold

features.description: Scaffold shared-skills repo structure (skills/, skill-creator/, evals/, variants/)
features.acceptance: Repo has: skills/ (empty), skill-creator/ (with placeholder SKILL.md), evals/ (runner scaffold), variants/ (registry.json), .gitignore, README.md

features.description: Install @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli globally and verify mmdc works
features.acceptance: mmdc --version returns a version; mmdc -i test.mmd -o test.png renders a simple flowchart without error

features.description: Create Mermaid SKILL.md in pete-pa with hierarchical routing decision tree (based on SpillwaveSolutions). Routes user intent to specialized guides: activity, deployment, architecture, sequence diagrams, code-to-diagram, design doc templates. Includes resilient workflow with error recovery.
features.acceptance: pete-pa/skills/mermaid-diagram/SKILL.md exists with: YAML frontmatter (name, description, version), decision tree routing to per-type guides, resilient workflow section (validate â†’ troubleshoot â†’ retry), file naming conventions, references to all guide files

features.description: Port Mermaid Python utility scripts from SpillwaveSolutions: extract_mermaid.py (extract + validate diagrams from markdown), mermaid_to_image.py (render .mmd to PNG/SVG with themes + batch), validate_mermaid.py (resilient workflow with error recovery)
features.acceptance: All 3 scripts in pete-pa/skills/mermaid-diagram/scripts/. extract_mermaid.py: --validate flag works with mmdc, --list-only shows diagram metadata, --replace-with-images substitutes code blocks. mermaid_to_image.py: single + batch render, --theme support. validate_mermaid.py: save .mmd + render + validate + error recovery loop.

features.description: Create Mermaid reference guides: comprehensive diagram-type guide, per-type specialized guides (activity, deployment, architecture, sequence), 28-error troubleshooting catalog, unicode semantic symbols guide
features.acceptance: pete-pa/skills/mermaid-diagram/references/ contains: mermaid-diagram-guide.md (diagram type selection + syntax), guides/diagrams/ (4 specialized guides), guides/troubleshooting.md (28+ errors with severity, incorrect/correct examples, fixes), guides/unicode-symbols/guide.md (10+ symbol categories)

features.description: Create Mermaid command launcher in pete-pa and test by generating a real diagram
features.acceptance: pete-pa/commands/diagram-mermaid.md exists with YAML frontmatter (description, allowed-tools: Read Write Bash Glob, model: sonnet); loads mermaid-diagram skill; tested by generating a flowchart .mmd that validates with mmdc and renders to PNG

features.description: Create Excalidraw reference files (based on coleam00): json-schema.md (element types, properties, bindings), color-palette.md (semantic color system â€” single customization point), element-templates.md (copy-paste JSON templates for each element type)
features.acceptance: pete-pa/skills/excalidraw-diagram/references/ contains: json-schema.md (element types, common/text/arrow-specific properties, binding format, roundness), color-palette.md (semantic shape colors, text hierarchy colors, evidence artifact colors, stroke/line colors), element-templates.md (templates for free-floating text, line, dot, rectangle, text-in-shape, arrow)

features.description: Create Excalidraw Playwright render pipeline (based on coleam00): render_excalidraw.py (JSON â†’ PNG via headless Chromium), render_template.html (loads @excalidraw/excalidraw from esm.sh), pyproject.toml (playwright dependency for uv)
features.acceptance: pete-pa/skills/excalidraw-diagram/references/ contains: render_excalidraw.py (validates JSON, computes bounding box, renders via Playwright, outputs PNG), render_template.html (ES module importing exportToSvg from esm.sh), pyproject.toml (playwright as dependency). First-time setup works: uv sync && uv run playwright install chromium

features.description: Create Excalidraw SKILL.md in pete-pa (based on coleam00) with: 'argue not display' philosophy, depth assessment routing (simple vs comprehensive), research mandate for technical diagrams, evidence artifacts, multi-zoom architecture, container discipline, visual pattern library, section-by-section large diagram strategy, MANDATORY render-view-fix loop, 27-point quality checklist
features.acceptance: pete-pa/skills/excalidraw-diagram/SKILL.md exists with: YAML frontmatter (name, description, version), core philosophy (isomorphism test, education test), depth assessment, design process (6 steps), visual pattern library (8+ patterns), large diagram strategy, text rules, JSON structure, render & validate section (mandatory loop with specific defect checklist), quality checklist (27 items across 5 categories)

features.description: Create Excalidraw command launcher in pete-pa and test by generating a real diagram with render validation
features.acceptance: pete-pa/commands/diagram-excalidraw.md exists with YAML frontmatter (description, allowed-tools: Read Write Bash Glob, model: sonnet); loads excalidraw-diagram skill; tested by generating a simple .excalidraw file that renders to PNG via render_excalidraw.py

features.description: Port Anthropic skill-creator SKILL.md to shared-skills repo (adapted to Pete's patterns)
features.acceptance: shared-skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md exists; 5-stage workflow preserved (capture intent, interview, write SKILL.md, test/evaluate, iterate); adapted references to shared-skills repo structure; references Pete's YAML frontmatter conventions (name, description, version); includes description optimization stage

features.description: Port skill-creator agent prompts (grader, comparator, analyzer)
features.acceptance: shared-skills/skill-creator/agents/ contains grader.md, comparator.md, analyzer.md; adapted from Anthropic originals; grader evaluates skill output quality; comparator does A/B variant comparison; analyzer examines benchmark trends

features.description: Port eval scripts (run_eval.py, generate_report.py, aggregate_benchmark.py, utils.py)
features.acceptance: shared-skills/skill-creator/scripts/ contains run_eval.py, generate_report.py, aggregate_benchmark.py, utils.py; scripts adapted to work with shared-skills directory structure; run_eval.py can test if a skill triggers correctly for a set of queries; aggregate_benchmark.py summarizes pass/fail rates

features.description: Port eval helper scripts (improve_description.py, package_skill.py, quick_validate.py, run_loop.py)
features.acceptance: shared-skills/skill-creator/scripts/ contains improve_description.py, package_skill.py, quick_validate.py, run_loop.py; improve_description.py optimizes skill trigger accuracy; package_skill.py bundles a skill directory; quick_validate.py does fast sanity check; run_loop.py orchestrates full eval workflow

features.description: Port eval viewer (viewer.html + generate_review.py)
features.acceptance: shared-skills/skill-creator/eval-viewer/ contains viewer.html and generate_review.py; viewer shows dual-panel (outputs + benchmark); generate_review.py creates review data from eval results; viewer opens in browser and displays test results

features.description: Port schemas reference and create skill template
features.acceptance: shared-skills/skill-creator/references/schemas.md exists with JSON schemas for eval data structures; shared-skills/template/SKILL.md exists with Pete's YAML frontmatter conventions (name, description, version); template includes placeholder sections matching Pete's skill patterns

features.description: Create A/B variant infrastructure in shared-skills
features.acceptance: shared-skills/variants/registry.json exists (empty registry); shared-skills/variants/README.md documents the A/B workflow (create variant B alongside champion A, run evals against both, promote winner); directory convention: variants/{skill-name}/A/SKILL.md and B/SKILL.md

features.description: Wire git submodule from cowork to shared-skills
features.acceptance: cowork/.gitmodules references petermcalister/shared-skills; cowork/.claude/skills/shared/ is a submodule checkout of shared-skills/skills/; git submodule update --init in a fresh clone populates the directory

features.description: Graduate diagram skills from pete-pa to shared-skills (move + symlink or reference update)
features.acceptance: Mermaid and Excalidraw skills exist in shared-skills/skills/; pete-pa commands updated to reference skills from shared-skills via submodule path OR skills remain in pete-pa with copies in shared-skills (agent decides based on what works for plugin packaging)

features.description: Run skill-creator eval on both diagram skills as validation
features.acceptance: run_eval.py executed against mermaid-diagram and excalidraw-diagram skills; trigger queries tested (at least 8 should-trigger, 8 should-not per skill); both skills achieve >80% trigger accuracy; eval results saved to shared-skills/evals/results/

features.description: Update pete-pa plugin version and CLAUDE.md documentation
features.acceptance: pete-pa plugin.json version bumped; CLAUDE.md updated with diagram skills section, shared-skills submodule section; deploy-plugin.sh still produces valid .plugin.zip
